charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake gene sequences

Source: R/sequences.R
ch_gene_sequence.Rd

Create fake gene sequences

ch_gene_sequence(n = 1, length = 30)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
length

(integer) length of sequence to create

See also

SequenceProvider

Examples

ch_gene_sequence()

#> [1] "GCAATCTNNTNGNGNAGNTCACGAGGGTTC"
ch_gene_sequence(10)

#>  [1] "AGGCTNGGTTCANGTNGTGGNTTCTTNGCT" "CANANAAGNCTAGCGCANNCNCGGGGANGA"
#>  [3] "CNTNTNCCGCNCATNNTCNNCCGNNNNNTC" "AAGAGGGGTNNCNNNTTNAGACNNNTANCT"
#>  [5] "CATCNANNTCNCNTGCGCCGAGTANGGGAA" "GTTGTAATATNTACGNAGCCCTCNTGCAAN"
#>  [7] "GAGATATGNCNATGNAGTNNAGCTCGCCCG" "AGTCATACGACAAATCGGCNAGACCNCCCN"
#>  [9] "TAGANTCAGGGGTNTTANGAACTGGACCGA" "AACGAGTGNGTACNANNATGCNNTANAANC"
ch_gene_sequence(100)

#>   [1] "NCNTTTCNNACAATCTNNANGCGNTAGGAT" "NTCCCANGACCGGCCCCNATANGCTNNCAC"
#>   [3] "TCGTCAGGAGNTNAANNTTCTNNACCNNNG" "CCGAATNNATNCGTAAGCCGCNCCAATTCG"
#>   [5] "CCATGATTAACTNAAGCAAGCCNGAGNGGC" "TNANGCTNTCNANTAANNAGGCAGTAGTTN"
#>   [7] "NNTCTNCNAGNGCTNCNCCTAGAGTGGCTA" "NGGTTTGCGTACNTAGCNCTNNANAGNTAG"
#>   [9] "NNAGANGCCCTGACGACNTNNAATAAACGA" "GCTNATCNCGCNNTTGCANANCNCATAGAC"
#>  [11] "GNNAAANNGATCTTNNCCTCGGNNNANTGG" "ANNTATGGTTTCCGGCCTNNGGTCNTGTCC"
#>  [13] "TAGGCANNTCCCGGACCGNCNATAAGNGGC" "NAAAAGNANTTTNGCNNTATATNCGATAGT"
#>  [15] "AGGCAANCCATATNGNNCNCNAAANGNATT" "GCGTTACGANATCGGGAGAGCTATCNNANG"
#>  [17] "CGCTTGTANNCNTCTCCGCACACAGNTGCT" "ACCAATGGNNNCCGGGGNCANATTCTNCAN"
#>  [19] "NTNNNCTNNTTCGATCAATAGNANTTGTTA" "NNTCNGAGCAACAGCCGANTTCTCGCCANN"
#>  [21] "TNGTCNANNGGGTAGNTTACGACCNNGAAG" "GCCAGCTGGANNAAGGGACCAANGNGGGNT"
#>  [23] "TNNCGNTTNGTCAGTNCAATACNNAANTCA" "CGNTGNTGTNTCNTANNTNGGCAGTGTAAT"
#>  [25] "TTGTNCCGGTGGCNTATAAACGCGTCCACN" "AATTCCTTGGAACAATGNTGTCTCNAGGTG"
#>  [27] "TCCCCTGATAANNGTGTNCAGGNNTGAATT" "GGTNNATNACAAGATCTCGCTGCCANNNNA"
#>  [29] "ACAATNATAGATTANATCATTTNTCANAAG" "AATGANCNTCCTANTTNNAATNGCACCGCT"
#>  [31] "GTTACTTNNCNACNCCAAATNGTGNNTATA" "GAGNNACTACATTATTTANGNACNTGCACC"
#>  [33] "NTCCGNANCNAGTNGGACCTTNATNNTCAT" "AGCTGACNGACTNTGATATAANGNCTACGN"
#>  [35] "GCAGGGNAGAGAAGGCCCGGGATCCTACTT" "GTNNGNATGNGGNTTNTTCTTCTAAACTCG"
#>  [37] "AGANCTGACNNGTCTNTCCNCAGCGCTCGT" "CNAANTAGNTGATTCGNNGCCCTGCGNTCG"
#>  [39] "NNANNNAANTGNATTGGGTCTATNCTNGGN" "TNTAAAGTAGNATGCGCNATGCGCACANCN"
#>  [41] "CTGNGAGNCNGGGNGTTGGGNTAGNCTACT" "CCNTCNCTCATAACTTTCGCGCNNNCAAAG"
#>  [43] "AAGANTCCTAACGGACTNCCCCGAGTGTCN" "GNTNGGGTCCTAGCCGCTGNCNTNAAAATA"
#>  [45] "TGGATGCNAGCCGGTNNANGANCNTNGGNT" "GGNGTGGNCGTGNCNNGTGTGGGTCCTTCC"
#>  [47] "NATCAAGGANGNCCNTNCNCGGCCNAGCTC" "CCGAGTNCTNGGGACCGCAGGCTACGNTTC"
#>  [49] "ANGCCGNGCAGAGGNCCNTTCGCGGTTATA" "NNGGCCTTACCNTNNCTCGNGGGANCGACA"
#>  [51] "TGNCNGAGCNGCCTAATAGTNATTAACACT" "AGNGGCATAGGNGGTCANGAGCGANCNANC"
#>  [53] "TTNCGANTCCCTNGTGCNNAAATGNAGCNN" "NNGAAGGTAGTTCGGCTNNNGNCNGNTACC"
#>  [55] "CCTCGCNCCTCGGNGNNNAAGCATTGTATC" "CCGAACCNTCTCTTCCACNCGGNAATCNNN"
#>  [57] "NGNACNNAGTAAGTTCCNTATCGTCTAGGC" "CCCAACCCACATTACCTNTTGACTATAGTA"
#>  [59] "NTGNGNNCNCNGNCAGCNGANAGCTCNTNT" "CAACCTGGAGCCTNCANGATGNNNGGTATN"
#>  [61] "CNANANCAGNNCANNTCGATNGGAGNGNAN" "ANCTGTATATTGGCTCNCATTNTANGTNGC"
#>  [63] "TGNCTCCCAACNCGGCACTATCCGCAGGTT" "GTNCGNCTNGTNCGGNAGNNAAANNCGCCG"
#>  [65] "GNCNTCAGACANGANATGNCGGGTNGNATC" "NNTACNNCTCAACANGCNGCNGGNTGGNGT"
#>  [67] "NCCCTCACNTCTCTNTTACCTACANNNNGC" "NCTATNCNCTGACCACCGGCTTTTTGNTNA"
#>  [69] "NAATGCCNNAGNGCTCGNNGNTAGANCCTA" "CNGNNCGCGACCNATNNGCCGTGCTNTCAC"
#>  [71] "NCNGGNCAAANCNNATCGGGAGGANATNAT" "GTTTGTTNAAAGNCACNTGCCCTCTCCCNA"
#>  [73] "NGGCANTGATAANGTGTCACGTGCTGANCT" "CGTAATNATTANNNCTNGCCNGCANNATNC"
#>  [75] "ANACTAGANNAATGTCNANCNGCCNACGCC" "CCANNTCAAGTNGTTAGTNTTAANNCANGA"
#>  [77] "TCNNTGAGTACNCGATTAGCGGCTNCTGCA" "NAAATNGTGNNNGANGNTCAAAGNTCTGCG"
#>  [79] "GTCGCANANGATTNTNANCCTTAAGTGNNG" "CTNCTTNTTTCGNGNTGCNGCATGTNNTCA"
#>  [81] "NCNGGAGCACANAGGCNTCTANANNNANNN" "GNTTCANNCCTACCAGCGACGCACTACNGN"
#>  [83] "TGNAAAAAANGATNNTAGTATGGAACCAAG" "GNTNNTTCAAGNNTTTATANNCATGACCCC"
#>  [85] "NCGCCCGNAAACACACNNNATACGNNCATT" "AANCNGNNGCCTTCATACAANACNGCAATT"
#>  [87] "NGGAGATGATTAGTNATTCACCCCCCGGAN" "GGACTGNCGGANATCNATNCCNAGCNCGCA"
#>  [89] "TTTCCGTNNANCAACGTTAAACNNTTATAN" "GCATCANATTCGGNGCTNCCCGTGAGACNN"
#>  [91] "AGTNANANGNGATTNAGNNANTGTNNTCAC" "CANTGNCATGAATATNTAGNTGNCGCNTGA"
#>  [93] "GGNNCNTGTAACATCNTGGGGTAAAGTCTA" "TCGGTGACCAGGATAGACATGAANCAANAC"
#>  [95] "GCGACCCCTCCTNTNGNANTCCCGGNCNCG" "TCNATGGGCGTNGGCTCTGATGAAGNNNCA"
#>  [97] "TCGNCNGCTGGTTNCTNACNGGACATCGTC" "ACTGGCNNGNANGNANTNANCTAGATAAAN"
#>  [99] "TCNTNNGTTTCACCNCCNNGGAGTGNCNGN" "GGGTCGNCCCATTGAGTTATNCTGGANGNN"

ch_gene_sequence(length = 500)

#> [1] "GATCAAAATGTTCATTAACATCCTTANCANNTTTCGTCNAAAGTACAATNAAAAAATNNTTCACGTGCGGTCAACANGANCGCAATAACTGGNGGCNATGAAGNANNTCACNGCTGACCANAAGTGTNTCNTTCTACNAACTGCCNAGTTCNACTTGNNNNAAANTACAGANTNTCNNNACCTNTGTNTGGCCNNCTNNGCATTGGAGGNCTGACCNGTAAGNNCGTACAGTNCCAGANGNTCTGNNNTCGTAATGNATNGGTCAGCGNCGCAACGCATACGTANCGTGCTNCCATTTAGTNNNNNCGTNCCGCAATCTCTGGGCGCGCTNNCNNNGTTTCANNNCNGCTCGTCNGTNGNNTCATACTTNANCGGGCCAANANGGCTTGNCNGCCTNNTNNNNCCACGACNAGANGCCTTTACGTCTGGTACCAGCGNCCAAATANTTGGTTGCGNTACNCATGGAGACGANTACNGATGGACNATGTNNCAGAGCTATA"
ch_gene_sequence(10, length = 500)

#>  [1] "GCNCACGNCCTAGANTTGNGNACCAGNNTANTANACNNNTTTAANTATNNAGGTTTCTATTTNNCGACGGAGATACAAAGCTTNNAGNTCGTCAGNNCTNNCGGGAGTACNGTTTNNGTTGCAGCCGCAGACGTCCGNCGGCACNTNNACGTCTTTTCNGGCGNCTNGACGTGTNTAATACNATAATCANGNNNGNTGGNATCTTNTTTATGNGTNAATTNTANAGNTTTCNNNTAANTNGNTCTCGCGACNGNNNAACGNNGCGGAATCATCGCAGCNCCTATCTTTTCNCNACGGNTAGNGTGTAAATAAGTCCAGATANTAGATAGCTCGTACNNGANNGCGCCCGAGGGGCNTCCGNNCNCGNNCCCGTTAACANGCANNACNTGGTCNCAATNACATTGNGAGAGNCCCTNACTGNACNCCTGACNATCTCGNGAGANNTANGTCCTGCNCCAAACNTACNTCTANGNACTCNTCNTGNGTANCANAGAGNGNGA"
#>  [2] "GACGTGNNCACGTATATTCNTACNNCNNTTNGAGTNNNTTGNANNNGTGTAAGACNAGNCGNTGCAACGGTCNATTNGNATCNGNANTCNACAAAGCNNTCATTNNNCTATTCCGCGCCATCTCCATNNGTGANTGANCTNCTATTTAGANATTNANGATNACTTTACGTGGGNTGCNNNAGCNGAGGGNGAGTCNCNGGTCNCTTCGNGATNCNGNNNTNCGGAGNCNATCGATCCAGNTAAANGATNCGCCCNCTAGATATCTCNATCACNANGGTATANNACGGGCATCNNCGCNNAGNCGTGACAAATCTNCATGGCNGNTAANACCGCNACAGTCCNGAANTGTCNTNGAACGTTAACNTGAAACNGACNTNCTACNANNNATGCNANCTNCCANAGNCTTCGTCAGCCAATCAATGGAAGTNCGAAGNGCACGATACGNTANGCGNAANCGAGGTNCNCAAGAGAGCTTTCCNANCCGNAGCCATCNGGNTNTA"
#>  [3] "TCGCGCAATGCANAACGNNGTNTATCANCTGNNATGAGTCGTGTNAGNACCGTTGCCNNGTTTGGTGGCNNNATNNCTACNNGNTTTAGTNNTCTGCANANNAGACANATNCGANNNNGTTGGAGGAAAGTANCGATAATNTTNGGACNNNACTCCGGCNATATAATTGAGGCTCNCTNGNNTAGANNTGGATAGCGNGTGCGTTGATTCGATNCNGGGCGCTTGGCCTNANTNGCCANCTCCNTCTGTGACTGNCNTCAGNCGAATNAAAGGGAGCTTCGNGGGNGTNCNTNCAANNCGAACCTNCGTGAATNAGNACCCGNACCTTNAGNATACTGNAGCANAGCNGNCGNCACAGGCTGCCCNGGCCANNCCGTAGTAAGNCCACNCGTGTNCACNGAGANNATNATTATNTCCTNAGATNAANGNTGCATCNGCNGTACGANNCTGGGCNCCCGNCGAATANNCCTGTTNAGNANATTNTCNAGANATGTTACTCN"
#>  [4] "AAACNTGTNTGCTTNCGTGGNAAAGTGATGCGTATCAGNCGTTCCGCCNCTCTNCTGGTTANGTNCNGATAAGGTCTCCGATCTTGAGNCCCAANGTCTGCNTCGGNACNANGNTNTANCTACGACAANAANNGGNTNTGTANNGGCATAANNCNCGGCGCCCAGANTTAACGTCTAAGGGTAACGTTAGTTCGATATAGCNNATGNGTGTANAATTTACGCAAGNNANTNCTGGCCCTGATTNNTGACTNGNGCTACCNGAGCTCCAGNGGGAACTGCNGNATCNTTCGGTNGTCAGTAGATTGTGNNTNCTCGAGTNTANCCTGGCGACCCTCTCANNGCGTGGATGNCNTAGCCCNNANGNNCNNAGGTGGATACCNCTAAGATCNNGCTCGCCGCNTNCCTCCCTTTGGCCAGNCACATNCGTTTANTGCGNGCTGACGGAGNCGGTATTACACGNGGTCCNGGNGTNGCGTACTNNGCCCACGTGGGCTNACGAC"
#>  [5] "NGTTNTGAGCGCAGNTCGNAAGGAGGGATANCNACGACTNNNTNTAGNCAAAANTCTCGTGNNNNAANTAATCACNANTNANCANNACNGGNNCNACNNGCATNCNATATCATTGNTNGTATCTTCCGNNCTTCNNGTNTANNNCTNCTTGTTNANNGACANATTNNCTNNTTGACCTAGNAGACTGGGNNTCCTTGAACGCTCGNAACTTGGAANCTAAANCTTGTCNTGTATCTGACTNGCTGCTNTGNGANCTNCCNCACAAATNNTTANTTAGAAAATTNATGTAGGACNGGCCGAACGNGNCAACTGGNCCCNNTTGTCATGTCGAGTNGNCNTNNCACNAGACGCTANACGAACTCTCGCCNGGNTNATGGCGGNANGGTACTGNCCGGCTCNCNCGTNTCATTTNCGATTNTCNCGCTATNCCGNTCATACTTAAGNNAATCNTAGGANCTGACATTNNNGNCGCGACAAATCCGCGGANCGCAGANGNGGTG"
#>  [6] "TGGAGACGTNGATTGCCCTTTNNNAGTTTACCAAAGNGTTTAGTCCTTCNAAACTNCGCTCAATGATTGACCTCCAATANACTGNCCCNGNANANTACNCAANCTNTACGTGTCNNGTTTCNCATGTNCCNAGGTNATCAGAACGNNGCTAGTAGNNAGGAAGCGTCGCGGANAAAGANCTTCNGNNATANCCGNNCCTGTTTNTCAGGTTGACAGANNGAGNCCCNCGTAGCANAGTNCGNCNCNCTATNTCTTTTACNATGNNANNNGCACGCCNGGNNCGNTCCAGANGNCCNAGNNACNANTAAGCTAGNTNGCCCGNNAAANTTGTNNNGTNNCNNCGGGTTGCGGNGCGGGCGGGCGAAGTCCAGCTNGGNNCTAANAACCNCNGAAACNGAGGGAAGGATTCAACNTANCGANACACGCGGATNTNNAACANGCAGTATGTACCGTCGCTGGCACCGATTNNCNAGACGGTANTCNCGNACGACAGANACTAC"
#>  [7] "CCTGCCGCAGTNNNCGCGGTNCNGNNGNGTACCNNANACACGGGTAAATCGACGATNNCACTATNCNGNAAGTCANCTAGNNAGGAANGCTACNGGCATTTCNNNNNAGNTAAGGACANCAGGGATTNGGACGNTTNNAATATGATTCTTTGCGACTNCGNGANACAANCCCTAAGCNGTNNAACGNCTTCTANNAGANCAGTACACCGGNCATNCTACTAANGGNGACTNCGTNNAAGGACNNTTTAGNCCNCTCANATATANGGGTNCAANACCTCTGNTAAGGCNCATNNGGGNNGNNGANTCGNGGATAGACGTNTCACACGTTATNAGNCGCNCNATTTANCNTANTAGAGCTGNATAATACTCTNTATACGCGNACCNNCTCCCCAGGGCGNATCTGGTATGTCTGTGAACCNTCANTACCTGCGACGTACGCNTCATCANGNCCTTGGACTNNNGTNNGNCAGTTAATTTTAGGGTGCGAGNGTAGCNNGGGA"
#>  [8] "GCNNCCGATAGANNNTNCCCTTATTGCNNCGNGNTNATCTNAACTGTGNNCNCNTTATCCCTNCTAAGNCCGAAGTAANGCGACNCACTTGTACTANGGTAGCCATACCNNCNGTACCNANNNNAACGAGCGTCTTTGCCNANGTCGNNNNGGATNNNGAGCANNGAANTTTTCTAGATCTNGTATANCGCTNTCGTANCAAAAGTNGCCACTATGNCCGCCCCGAGAATCTGTNCCTCNNGNNTCCAGCTAAGTGNTGNGTGTAGGTNGGNGAGGANANTGTGNCTGTCNGTACNCAGGNANTATTTCTGCGNGATTGCGACNCCGTCTGCACTATGCNGTTNNTGAATNNCGNACNGNCTAGGTAGTNCAANGCGGTTCTCCTATTCTGTTNCCGGCCTGTTTCTAAANAATGGNCGAAGGTCTTGCNNTNTTGCACCGCGTNAANGGACTANTTTGTGAGTNTGCCGCCTACTCGGATGCACNATTANACTNNACCC"
#>  [9] "CTCNCGTGTCTGNNGGNAANTAAGGANNNTGTTCCACTNGGGNGTGTGGNTCACATNTACGCTNGCCAGGGATNCTCAGNCNCATNCACNGGAACCCANCNGTAGCNNGCTGNAATTGTTCGATCAANTTAATNGTTCTCNCGNTNTTGNANAATNCCNTGGCGGCCACCCGNCTGGNCTGTAAAAACNANTNTGTACTNNTAGTCNTANGNNGACACGTGNTANCGATANTGCGANGTATTNTTTGNGCCGCTAGAACTNCGCTGNCNTCNTTCGNNCGCTTATAATCTATNTCNCAGGCTATNGTNGNGGGAGTGAGGTNCGNCAGGGGNCANCCATCANTTCNNNGGCCACGNCGCATNCANCNGANNATTANTNATANGACGTANTTTCANGGCNCGCNNATACCNAGNNTGTNTGTTAGTCGTNGNTNCTAACGGCTTGTCTTGNAGGGCGACNCGTTCCTATTGCNANGCCNGCTGAGTTGATNCNCGCCANAN"
#> [10] "GTTNGAAANGCCAGTGATAACTCTTTCGNGACCAAANAANGCCCCNNTNTTGNGCCGAGNGNGACTGANATGCCNCCTTCTCCNTTGAAGACNGTGATCNGNTCCTNNAATGNTGTCCCTANTCGNCTCCANACGTATTCCACCNNCANAAANTATACGAGACNTGTNGATGTNCNAGGNGNTGACTGCGATCANGCAAGNATGCCCTCTNCNCNCGTTCTGNTNNTANTAGGTCAGATATTGCACNANCGTCAANNAGCGGNGCCNACACCCATNGNGGCNGNNTCACTAGCNGANGCCATCAGGGCAGTNNAGATNNGANTNTCNTTCANGGGCCNGTGGTGCATCGCCCGNNAGTTCCNGNCNNCANGTGTTNATCNTCTNTCNCTTCTCCCGTTNAGGCNCCNGAGGGTCTTTGACTGTAGGNCCAGCACCTGCCCNGNANNTCNGNAGAGNTCTCCANACANGGTGANNANACNGNATCCTTCGGATCNTNTNCN"
